KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS.title: Unconscious
KOMEIJIKOISHI-UNCONSCIOUS.description: Cards with this tag can be automatically played.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM.title: Bloom
KOMEIJIKOISHI-BLOOM.description: When you play an Attack, deal damage equal to that card's damage to a random enemy. Block gained is reduced by 70%. Gain 1 Energy upon entering.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED.title: Closed
KOMEIJIKOISHI-CLOSED.description: Block gained is increased by 20%. Draw 1 card upon entering this stance.
KOMEIJIKOISHI-DANMAKU.title: Danmaku
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STANCE.title: Stance
KOMEIJIKOISHI-STANCE.description: Closed and Bloom stances each have special effects when switching between them.
